final_choice.row_label: Current Portion of Long-Term Debt excluding Capitalized Leases

variables.notes: R:nc. Excluded lease liabilities per rule. Avoided 'Short-Term Debt & Current Portion of Long-Term Debt' because separate line shows current portion including capitalized leases. Chose minimal non-lease components; second label is outside shortlist but clearly matches baseline STD.
